revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-8-235

An enclosure (or machine) designed to restrict or prevent the ingress of liquids or solid particles in harmful quantities, or solid extraneous objects of specified size.


Note: 1   See also 6-4-140.


Note: 2  The different categories of protection are specified for enclosures in IEC 529, and for machines in IEC 34-5.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Protected enclosure (or machine)}}
